BOSS_HP_DOUBLE_DEBUFF.title: Nightmare Boss
BOSS_HP_DOUBLE_DEBUFF.description: Bosses are now much harder to kill.
SCALING_PLATING_DEBUFF.title: Damage Barrier
SCALING_PLATING_DEBUFF.description: All enemies now gain armor that decreases over time and increases with difficulty.
GOLD_GAIN_BUFF.title: Golden Fortune
MULTI_SMITH_BUFF.title: Master Blacksmith
MULTI_SMITH_BUFF.description: At Rest Site, Smith can upgrade multiple cards each use.
FEARLESS_HERO_BUFF.title: Fearless Hero
FEARLESS_HERO_BUFF.description: Only random event rooms will appear on the map.
NO_POTION_DEBUFF.title: Potion Lockdown
NO_POTION_DEBUFF.description: You cannot use or obtain potions. Potion rewards become gold, and merchants no longer sell potions.
CLONE_RUN_DEBUFF.title: Pel's Minion
CLONE_RUN_DEBUFF.description: Starting in Act 2, you automatically gain Pel's Clone blessing, but you will sacrifice a portion of your HP to him when you clone.
INFINITY_ENDLESS_MODE_DEBUFF.title: Infinite Loop
INFINITY_ENDLESS_MODE_DEBUFF.description: After defeating the final boss, your run continues into a new 15-room loop map instead of ending.
